modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Launchpad shows an expiration notice for my code.

full_description_text: The user mentioned that while trying to access their nutrition course, they received a notice saying their Launchpad code has expired. This happened unexpectedly during their session. They were just trying to get into the course materials when the issue popped up.
short_description: Launchpad shows an expiration notice for my code.
description: The user mentioned that while trying to access their nutrition course, they received a notice saying their Launchpad code has expired. This happened unexpectedly during their session. They were just trying to get into the course materials when the issue popped up.
